description: Perform an epidemiological analysis of the patient population in the DrTuxTest database (user: root, no password). Generate a CSV report cross-tabulating patient counts by Postal Code (FchPat_CP), Age Bracket, and Sex (FchPat_Sexe). Ages should be calculated from the birth date field (FchPat_Nee) relative to today using the brackets: '0-17', '18-39', '40-59', '60-79', '80+'. Export the final data to /home/ga/reports/catchment_analysis.csv with headers 'postal_code,age_bracket,sex,patient_count', excluding groups with zero patients.
